subjects.description: A small child wearing a bright red hooded jacket with the hood up and dark trousers, stepping off the curb to cross the town street directly in the vehicle's path
subjects.appearance_details: Carries a small backpack, wears sneakers spotted with rain; the red jacket warm against the muted pastel walls, hood raised against the drizzle
subjects.relationship: The pedestrian hazard that prompts the ego vehicle to brake; the central reason for the deceleration event
subjects.location: Center foreground, crossing from right sidewalk into the road
subjects.orientation: Profile view, facing left as the child walks across the road
subjects.pose: Mid-stride, one leg forward, arms slightly swinging while walking
subjects.action: Steps off the sidewalk and begins crossing the road
subjects.state_changes: Moves from curb into roadway, continuing across the vehicle's path and pausing briefly mid-road
subjects.clothing: Bright red hooded jacket with hood up, dark trousers, rain-spotted sneakers, small backpack
subjects.expression: Unaware and casual, looking ahead across the street
subjects.facial_features: Round face partly under the raised hood, dark hair, small features

subjects.description: A few parked cars and a motorbike along the curbs of the town street, damp in the drizzle
subjects.appearance_details: Older sedans and a small hatchback in faded colors, wet panels dull under the grey light beside a parked motorbike
subjects.relationship: Part of the residential environment; potential occlusion that hides the child until they step out
subjects.location: Left and right midground along the curbs
subjects.orientation: Parallel-parked, facing toward and away from camera along the road edges

background_setting: A residential street in a Latin American town under an overcast, drizzly spring sky. Colorful low stucco houses in faded pastels, with barred windows and a small corner shop, line a two-lane road of worn, wet asphalt. Utility wires cross overhead; a few parked cars and a motorbike sit along the curbs. Cracked sidewalks and a few potted plants edge the homes. A faint wet sheen coats the road and its worn center markings under the flat grey drizzle.

lighting.conditions: Overcast spring daylight with light drizzle
lighting.direction: Flat, diffuse light from the grey overcast sky, no direct sun
lighting.shadows: Essentially shadowless; faint soft grounding shadows on the wet road
lighting.illumination_effect: Flat grey illumination with a faint wet sheen; the child's red jacket stands out warmly against the muted pastel street

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-facing ego perspective with the road vanishing toward the horizon, child positioned in the central lane, parked cars framing the sides
aesthetics.color_scheme: Faded pastel stucco walls, grey overcast, wet worn asphalt with a dull sheen, and a warm red accent from the child's jacket
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Quiet, damp, everyday town calm broken by sudden caution
aesthetics.patterns: Repeating pastel houses and barred windows, overhead wires, a few parked cars and a motorbike

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward-moving ego dashcam motion that decelerates and comes to a complete stop
cinematography.framing: Wide shot from the driver's viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and crossing child; the drizzly distance softly muted

context: Autonomous driving or ADAS demonstration of pedestrian detection and emergency braking in a residential setting

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels forward at a moderate speed down the drizzly Latin American town residential street.
A small child in a red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing into the vehicle's path.
The ego vehicle promptly applies firm, controlled braking on the wet asphalt, decelerating as the nose dips slightly.
The vehicle reaches a complete stop well before the child and remains fully stopped while the child continues across.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: White painted text on the worn wet asphalt, partially faded, dull under the grey drizzle
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the road surface ahead, visible in the center of frame throughout
text_and_signage_elements.context: Traffic calming marking indicating a low-speed residential zone

segments.description: Ego vehicle cruises forward through the drizzly town street, pastel houses and a few parked cars along the wet worn asphalt.
segments.key_changes: Steady forward motion at moderate speed over wet asphalt
segments.camera: Forward dashcam motion, smooth and steady

segments.description: A child steps off the sidewalk into the road; the vehicle begins firm, controlled braking and decelerates rapidly on the wet surface.
segments.key_changes: Hazard appears; speed drops sharply, nose dips under braking
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing, slight forward pitch from deceleration

segments.description: The vehicle comes to a complete stop well before the child and holds stationary as the child crosses safely in the drizzle.
segments.key_changes: Vehicle fully stopped and held stationary

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam moves forward down a drizzly Latin American town residential street under flat grey light, pastel houses and a few parked cars along the wet road. By 0:01 a small child in a bright red jacket steps off the right sidewalk and begins crossing directly ahead. From 0:01 to 0:03 the ego vehicle applies firm, controlled braking on the wet asphalt, slowing with a slight forward pitch. By 0:03 the vehicle has stopped completely well before the child, and from 0:03 to 0:05 it holds stationary in the drizzle while the child crosses safely.
audio_description: Quiet town drizzle with the patter of light rain and a faint hiss of tires on wet asphalt, distant everyday sounds, the hum of the vehicle, then wet firm brake and tire friction as it decelerates, settling into a low idle under the drizzle.
